overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a foggy, snow-covered grassland field toward a distant obscured structure. The footage features heavy atmospheric fog, falling snow, and a desaturated sepia color grade, characteristic of a cinematic horror or survival game engine scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy winter field with distant farmhouse

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through waist-high snow-covered grass toward a distant structure barely visible through heavy fog

entered.detail: dense waist-high brown grass swaying slightly as the camera moves through it
tall evergreen trees forming a dark silhouette on the left edge of the field
obscured wooden structure with a pitched roof barely visible through the heavy fog and snowfall
white streaks of precipitation falling through the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a dense field of tall brown grass in a foggy winter landscape. To the left, a line of pine trees forms a dark border, while straight ahead, the silhouette of a distant farmhouse emerges faintly through the heavy fog and falling snow. The atmosphere is desolate and ominous, with very low visibility and a desaturated sepia tone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous forward movement through a desolate winter field that gradually reveals a mysterious distant structure. It begins by wading through a dense expanse of tall brown grass, where the visibility is severely limited by heavy falling snow and a thick, oppressive fog. As the camera advances, a dark border of pine trees emerges to the left, framing the path through the desaturated sepia landscape. The scene then shifts as the atmospheric haze slightly thins, allowing the faint, ominous silhouette of a farmhouse to materialize straight ahead.
